_doc: New-artist profile for The Final Journal AI. The Gunna/Thug/Uzi vault is the CRAFT reference (flow, wordplay, drip, effortlessness); CONTENT authenticity must come from the user's own life. These answers ground generation + the LLM-judge's `authenticity` axis in the user's truth so the system never rewards borrowing a lineage (YSL/Slime/insider codes) the user hasn't earned. Each question notes the dimension it feeds.

questions.question: Where are you from? (city / neighborhood / region)
questions.help: Grounds concrete, lived detail in a real place — not a borrowed one.

questions.question: What was your come-up like?
questions.help: The trenches↔riches engine, told honestly. A comfortable come-up is authentic too — faking the trenches is not.

questions.question: How do you get money right now? (day job, hustle, music only, school…)
questions.help: Keeps flexes honest — aspirational is fine if framed as the goal, not a lie about today.

questions.question: Do you have a crew, label, or people you rep? What do you call them? (or 'solo / none yet')
questions.help: So the system uses your own people's name instead of borrowing Slime/YSL/4PF.

questions.question: Who do you make music for right now?
questions.help: Sets who the verse is talking to (self → inner-circle → public).

questions.question: Where are you in your journey?
questions.help: A new artist's authentic posture is hungry/emerging — the judge expects that, and penalizes faking 'established'.

questions.question: Which artists shaped your sound?
questions.help: Sets the CRAFT target (flow, cadence, drip) without claiming their life.

questions.question: How do you want to come across?
questions.help: Tunes the 'cool' and the voice; you can pick more than one.

questions.feeds: theme coverage (maps to the 52 Master Concepts)
questions.question: Which of these are honestly YOURS to rap about? (pick what's true for you)
questions.help: The system only leans on themes you actually own — so it won't push you to fake a life. (Picking few is fine; range ≠ lying.)

questions.question: What's real (or really coming) in your world? (cars / jewelry you have or want, your block, a relationship, your story — be specific)
questions.help: Feeds concrete, surprising detail from YOUR life. Mark wants vs haves so flexes stay honest.

questions.question: Any lines you WON'T cross?
options: keep it clean (no hard drugs / slurs)
questions.help: Stops the system from putting an inauthentic (or risky) life in your mouth.

questions.question: Words, phrases, or slang that are yours or your city's?
questions.help: Builds a personal lexicon so your coinage is yours — not borrowed ATL/YSL slang.
